$comment: Sample visitor sign-in form. Seeded into the DB on first migration; admin UI is authoritative thereafter (same pattern as cambiar/config/change-types.json). Edit this file before first deploy to customize what the kiosk asks visitors. v0.1 ships this file but does not yet consume it — v0.2 introduces the kiosk sign-in flow that reads from the seeded fields.

fields.label: Mobile number
fields.$comment: Optional. Used for SMS host-arrival pings if SMS is enabled.

fields.label: Who are you here to see?
fields.$comment: Special type — populated server-side from local users + the AD visitas-world group. Renders as an autocomplete on the kiosk.

nda.$comment: NDA capture lands in v0.5. Drop the body in here, set enabled=true, the kiosk presents it after the form fields and captures a drawn signature.
nda.title: Visitor non-disclosure agreement

safety.$comment: Safety briefing acknowledgment lands in v0.5. Set enabled=true, fill in body, the kiosk presents it as a tap-to-acknowledge step.
safety.title: Workshop safety briefing

photo.$comment: Photo capture lands in v0.6 (uses the iPad's front camera). Stored 30 days, then purged. Printed on the badge.
